title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Sakura Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Sakura Bakushin O's gaze and see
Umamusume plushies on display as prizes for a
claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, those are the plushies my classmates keep
talking about!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, it's imperative to keep up
with the latest trends in class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm going to give that claw a good
Bakushin and get that plushie!
choice_data_list: Give the claw... a good Bakushin?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Once I give it some Bakushin energy,
it'll grab the plushie for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hardly believe blasting the claw with Bakushin
energy will guarantee her a plushie... I can already
see the outcome...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, spoken with confidence! You sounded real
dependable there! You strike me as a
professional!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This calls for my encouragement, in a class
representative-like fashion of course...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're invincible! Let's do our best!
